title: Lemon Herb Chicken Bowl
instructions: Marinate chicken with lemon, olive oil, garlic, and oregano for 20 minutes.
Cook quinoa until fluffy; set aside.
Sear chicken until cooked through, then slice.
Assemble bowl with quinoa, spinach, tomatoes, and sliced chicken.
Drizzle with remaining marinade as dressing.

title: Chickpea Spinach Curry
instructions: Saute onion, garlic, and ginger until fragrant.
Add spices and toast for 30 seconds.
Stir in tomato puree and simmer for 5 minutes.
Add chickpeas and cook for 10 minutes.
Fold in spinach until wilted and season to taste.

title: Overnight Oats with Berries
instructions: Combine oats, milk, yogurt, and chia seeds in a jar.
Top with berries and honey before serving.
